creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Am 9/29/10 4:40 PM, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of devel/cproto,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/151075 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/151075
> 

Looks ok. Thank you very much.

Please commit it.

Regards,
Thomas
